    Method
    Description
    abstract ImmutableSet<Pair<Sort,IObserverFunction>>
    ClassAxiom.getUsedObservers(Services services)
    Returns the pairs (kjt, obs) for which there is an occurrence of o.obs in the axiom, where kjt is the type of o (excluding the defining occurrence of the axiom target).

  • Uses of Pair in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule

    Subclasses of Pair in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule that return Pair
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Pair<SymbolicExecutionState,SymbolicExecutionState>
    MergeRuleUtils.handleNameClashes(SymbolicExecutionState mergeState, SymbolicExecutionState mergePartnerState, Services services)
    Due to the introduction of local namespaces, we run into trouble when applying state merging in the presence of locally introduced symbols.
    static Pair<Sort,Name>
    MergeRuleUtils.parsePlaceholder(String input, boolean registerInNamespaces, Services services)
    Parses a declaration of the type "<SORT> <NAME>", where <SORT> must be a sort known to the proof and <NAME> must be a fresh name.
    static Pair<Sort,Name>
    MergeRuleUtils.parsePlaceholder(String input, Services services)
    Parses a declaration of the type "<SORT> <NAME>", where <SORT> must be a sort known to the proof and <NAME> must be a fresh name.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule that return types with arguments of type Pair
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Optional<Pair<Term,Term>>
    MergeRuleUtils.getDistinguishingFormula(Term pathCondition1, Term pathCondition2, Services services)
    Computes a formula that implies pathCondition1 and, if pathCondition1 and pathCondition2 are contradicting, does not imply pathCondition2.
    static Optional<Pair<Term,Term>>
    MergeRuleUtils.getDistinguishingFormula(ArrayList<Term> conjElemsPathCond1, ArrayList<Term> conjElemsPathCond2, Services services)

    Description
